001package edu.cnm.deepdive.pippiphooray.controller;
002
003import android.os.Bundle;
004import android.view.LayoutInflater;
005import android.view.Menu;
006import android.view.MenuInflater;
007import android.view.MenuItem;
008import android.view.View;
009import android.view.ViewGroup;
010import android.widget.Toast;
011import androidx.annotation.NonNull;
012import androidx.annotation.Nullable;
013import androidx.core.view.MenuHost;
014import androidx.core.view.MenuProvider;
015import androidx.fragment.app.Fragment;
016import androidx.lifecycle.Lifecycle;
017import androidx.lifecycle.ViewModelProvider;
018import dagger.hilt.android.AndroidEntryPoint;
019import edu.cnm.deepdive.pippiphooray.R;
020import edu.cnm.deepdive.pippiphooray.databinding.FragmentBatchDetailBinding;
021import edu.cnm.deepdive.pippiphooray.model.entity.Batch;
022import edu.cnm.deepdive.pippiphooray.model.entity.EggGroup;
023import edu.cnm.deepdive.pippiphooray.model.pojo.BatchViabilitySummary;
024import edu.cnm.deepdive.pippiphooray.model.pojo.BatchWithEggGroups;
025import edu.cnm.deepdive.pippiphooray.viewmodel.BatchViewModel;
026import java.time.LocalDate;
027import java.time.format.DateTimeFormatter;
028import java.util.List;
029
030/**
031 * Fragment that displays detailed information about a single batch.
032 *
033 * <p>This includes batch metadata, incubator and breed information, key milestone
034 * dates, and current viability statistics.
035 */
036@AndroidEntryPoint
037public class BatchDetailFragment extends Fragment {
038
039  private static final DateTimeFormatter DATE_FORMATTER =
040      DateTimeFormatter.ofPattern("MMM d, uuuu");
041
042  private FragmentBatchDetailBinding binding;
043  private BatchViewModel batchViewModel;
044  private long batchId;
045
046  /**
047   * Inflates the batch-detail layout and initializes view binding.
048   *
049   * @param inflater           layout inflater.
050   * @param container          optional parent container.
051   * @param savedInstanceState saved instance state, if any.
052   * @return root view for this fragment.
053   */
054  @Nullable
055  @Override
056  public View onCreateView(
057      @NonNull LayoutInflater inflater,
058      @Nullable ViewGroup container,
059      @Nullable Bundle savedInstanceState
060  ) {
061    binding = FragmentBatchDetailBinding.inflate(inflater, container, false);
062    return binding.getRoot();
063  }
064
065  /**
066   * Completes view initialization, wiring ViewModel observers and UI event handlers.
067   *
068   * @param view               root view returned from {@link #onCreateView}.
069   * @param savedInstanceState saved instance state, if any.
070   */
071  @Override
072  public void onViewCreated(
073      @NonNull View view,
074      @Nullable Bundle savedInstanceState
075  ) {
076    super.onViewCreated(view, savedInstanceState);
077
078    batchViewModel = new ViewModelProvider(requireActivity()).get(BatchViewModel.class);
079    batchId = BatchDetailFragmentArgs.fromBundle(requireArguments()).getBatchId();
080
081    batchViewModel.setSelectedBatchId(batchId);
082    batchViewModel.getSelectedBatchViability().observe(getViewLifecycleOwner(), summary -> {
083      if (summary != null) {
084        bindViability(summary);
085      }
086    });
087
088    batchViewModel.getSelectedBatchWithGroups()
089        .observe(getViewLifecycleOwner(), batchWithGroups -> {
090          if (batchWithGroups != null) {
091            bindBatchWithGroups(batchWithGroups);
092          }
093        });
094
095    installMenu();
096
097    batchViewModel.get(batchId).observe(getViewLifecycleOwner(), batch -> {
098      if (batch != null) {
099        bindBatch(batch);
100      }
101    });
102
103    binding.bulkCandlingButton.setOnClickListener(v ->
104        BulkCandlingDialogFragment.newInstance(batchId)
105            .show(getChildFragmentManager(), BulkCandlingDialogFragment.class.getSimpleName())
106    );
107
108//    binding.perEggCandlingButton.setOnClickListener(v ->
109//        Toast.makeText(
110//            requireContext(),
111//            R.string.message_per_egg_candling_placeholder,
112//            Toast.LENGTH_SHORT
113//        ).show()
114//    );
115  }
116
117  private void installMenu() {
118    MenuHost menuHost = requireActivity();
119    menuHost.addMenuProvider(new MenuProvider() {
120      @Override
121      public void onCreateMenu(@NonNull Menu menu, @NonNull MenuInflater menuInflater) {
122        menuInflater.inflate(R.menu.menu_batch_detail, menu);
123      }
124
125      @Override
126      public boolean onMenuItemSelected(@NonNull MenuItem menuItem) {
127        if (menuItem.getItemId() == R.id.action_edit_batch) {
128          Toast.makeText(
129              requireContext(),
130              R.string.message_edit_batch_placeholder,
131              Toast.LENGTH_SHORT
132          ).show();
133          return true;
134        }
135        return false;
136      }
137    }, getViewLifecycleOwner(), Lifecycle.State.RESUMED);
138  }
139
140  private void bindBatch(@NonNull Batch batch) {
141    if (batch.getBatchNumber() != null) {
142      binding.batchTitle.setText(
143          getString(R.string.format_batch_title, batch.getBatchNumber()));
144    } else {
145      binding.batchTitle.setText(R.string.label_batch_detail);
146    }
147
148    binding.batchNumberValue.setText(
149        (batch.getBatchNumber() != null)
150            ? String.valueOf(batch.getBatchNumber())
151            : getString(R.string.value_unknown));
152
153    binding.incubatorValue.setText(
154        (batch.getIncubatorId() != null)
155            ? getString(R.string.value_incubator_selected)
156            : getString(R.string.value_unassigned));
157
158    binding.eggsSetValue.setText(String.valueOf(batch.getNumEggsSet()));
159
160    binding.dateSetValue.setText(formatDate(batch.getDateSet()));
161    binding.lockdownDateValue.setText(formatDate(getLockdownDate(batch)));
162    binding.expectedHatchDateValue.setText(formatDate(batch.getExpectedHatchDate()));
163
164    LocalDate dateSet = batch.getDateSet();
165    binding.day7Date.setText(formatDate(offsetDays(dateSet, 7)));
166    binding.day14Date.setText(formatDate(offsetDays(dateSet, 14)));
167    binding.day18Date.setText(formatDate(getLockdownDate(batch)));
168    binding.hatchDate.setText(formatDate(batch.getExpectedHatchDate()));
169  }
170
171  private void bindBatchWithGroups(@NonNull BatchWithEggGroups batchWithGroups) {
172    binding.breedsValue.setText(formatBreedSummary(batchWithGroups.getGroups()));
173  }
174
175  @Nullable
176  private LocalDate getLockdownDate(@NonNull Batch batch) {
177    if (batch.getLockdownDate() != null) {
178      return batch.getLockdownDate();
179    }
180    if (batch.getExpectedHatchDate() != null) {
181      return batch.getExpectedHatchDate().minusDays(3);
182    }
183    return offsetDays(batch.getDateSet(), 18);
184  }
185
186  @Nullable
187  private LocalDate offsetDays(@Nullable LocalDate date, long days) {
188    return (date != null) ? date.plusDays(days) : null;
189  }
190
191  @NonNull
192  private String formatDate(@Nullable LocalDate date) {
193    return (date != null)
194        ? DATE_FORMATTER.format(date)
195        : getString(R.string.value_unknown);
196  }
197
198  @NonNull
199  private String formatBreedSummary(@Nullable List<EggGroup> groups) {
200    if (groups == null || groups.isEmpty()) {
201      return getString(R.string.value_unknown);
202    }
203
204    StringBuilder summary = new StringBuilder();
205    for (int i = 0; i < groups.size(); i++) {
206      EggGroup group = groups.get(i);
207      if (group.getBreed() == null || group.getBreed().isBlank()) {
208        continue;
209      }
210      if (summary.length() > 0) {
211        summary.append(", ");
212      }
213      summary.append(group.getBreed());
214    }
215
216    return (summary.length() > 0)
217        ? summary.toString()
218        : getString(R.string.value_unknown);
219  }
220
221  private void bindViability(@NonNull BatchViabilitySummary summary) {
222    int total = summary.getTotalCount();
223    int viable = summary.getViableCount();
224
225    if (total > 0) {
226      binding.viableValue.setText(
227          getString(R.string.value_viability_dynamic, viable, total,
228              summary.getViableRate() * 100.0)
229      );
230    } else {
231      binding.viableValue.setText(R.string.value_viability_zero);
232    }
233  }
234
235  @Override
236  public void onDestroyView() {
237    binding = null;
238    super.onDestroyView();
239  }
240}
